claims.assertion: ChemWorld implements a typed closed-loop interface with replay-bound evaluation and explicit interaction capability strata.
In the frozen four-task slice, Safe-GP improved every primary endpoint, risk rate and cost relative to random search but failed the conjunctive rule because the flow effect was below its SESOI.
A single-seed 100,000-step SAC development run peaked at 80,000 steps and regressed at the final checkpoint.
Nine task-family mechanism controls were detectable, bounded, deterministic and mass conserving in the calibration probes.
The operation-level language-model adapter and causally isolated spectral masking pass offline controls, but no real-provider result is available.
ChemWorld establishes a confirmatory ranking of classical, reinforcement-learning and language-model agents.
Training in ChemWorld improves transfer to unseen virtual or real chemical systems.
Performance in ChemWorld predicts autonomous-agent performance in a physical laboratory.
